title: CasualWolfGamer's OAS Pack
description: Trying to find a pack that is programmer art and has old sounds that has a variety of old and new textures mixed into one pack? Try out my resource pack! Its been in the works since 2020. Everything in this pack is my personal pref. Read Description.
body:
My pack has Beta, Programmer Art and some Current textures along with some mixed textures such as Crying Obsidian, Cobblestone and Endstone, and custom 3D Item Models such as the torch, lantern, flower pot, etc and some 3D Model Blocks such as doors etc. 

**NOTE:** Not everything in my pack was made by me. Pls look at the credits.txt in the folder for all the people I have gotten my stuff from. I have gotten permission from them too.

This pack is compatable and uses stuff from the following mods:

Optifine
Optifabric
Chime
Cit Resewn
Continuity

You can use this pack without those mods if you want to but this is built into the pack. If you wanna see stuff like NBT Blocks with textures or Axolotl Variants in buckets tho, Install the mods I listed. If you use Sodium, just download Chime and Cit Resewn. If you use Optifine with Fabric, download Chime. 

Update 6/5/2026: This Resource Pack will no longer receive updates. The recent version 26.2 and up will no longer load this resourcepack and will fail to load. I have tried everything to try and fix it and had to come to a rough decision.
